pi_items.source: Task setup script copies the file, header indicates it is from the PhysioNet dataset.
export_result.sh checks explicitly for this file path to grade the user.
OpenBCI_GUI.pde source code defines channelColors array where index 0 is rgb(129, 129, 129).
OpenBCI_GUI.pde source code defines channelColors array where index 1 is rgb(124, 75, 141).

privileged_info_summary: The required playback file is OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt, containing real EEG data from the PhysioNet dataset. The expected screenshot path is verified as /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/asymmetry_setup.png. In the OpenBCI GUI source code, Channel 1 is mapped to Grey (RGB 129, 129, 129) and Channel 2 is mapped to Purple (RGB 124, 75, 141).
